hero.badge: Vera Gold Enerji - B2B Solution Partner
hero.title: Strong Infrastructure in Tough Rocks with Zero Tolerance.
hero.subtitle: Compressor and non-compressor rock drilling, solar piling solutions, and high-performance drilling equipment.

b2bServices.title: What We Excel At
b2bServices.subtitle: High-torque heavy excavation and drilling operations pushing boundaries in site engineering.

delgi.title: Heavy-Duty Rock Drilling & Piling (Compressor)
delgi.desc: Fast and millimetric solar site drilling and pile driving works in tough rock formations using high-pressure DTH hammer systems.

kiralama.title: Rotary & Auger Drilling (Compressorless)
kiralama.desc: Eco-friendly, quiet, and effective drilling solutions using high-torque rotary systems and custom augers on sites where compressor usage is restricted.

enerji.title: Industrial Drilling & Water Wells
enerji.desc: Deep soil geotechnical diagnostics, anchoring, micro-piling, and high-capacity industrial water well drilling operations.

arsenal.title: The Armored Arsenal
arsenal.subtitle: Our premium heavy-duty operational equipment park and B2B supplied consumables.

dth.title: DTH Hammers (Down-the-Hole)
dth.desc: High impact power, minimum wear. Special alloy steel structure providing high penetration rate in deep and hard rock formations.

bits.title: Rock Drill Bits & Accessories
bits.desc: Professional tungsten carbide bits defying the hardest granite and basalt terrains. Maximum abrasion resistance.
bits.spec: Bit Type: Ballistic, Spherical | Carbide Grade: A++

auger.title: Auger & Boring Tools
auger.desc: Heavy-duty augers suited for all soil formations in various diameters and sizes. Hard-faced flighting with wear plates.

consulting.title: Consultancy & Support Services
consulting.subtitle: Professional engineering supports we provide for drilling machinery, excavation gear, and corporate investments.
consulting.machineryDesc: Machinery selection, torque analysis, and mechanical performance consulting.
consulting.equipmentDesc: Drill bits, consumables, and operational efficiency analysis.
consulting.investmentDesc: Budget and feasibility reporting for B2B machinery acquisitions.
consulting.projectDesc: Engineering planning for large drilling and power plant projects.
consulting.sparePartsDesc: Original spare parts supply and periodic technical maintenance service.

services.title: Our Areas of Expertise
services.subtitle: Corporate services offered with modern technology and engineering expertise.

drill.title: Drilling Operations
drill.short: High-precision solutions in rock drilling, soil anchoring, geotechnical surveys, and tunneling.
drill.long: Vera Gold Enerji carries out rock drilling, ground stabilization, slope anchoring, and tunneling in tough terrain conditions.

rental.title: Rock Drill Fleet Rental
rental.short: A wide, well-maintained, high-performance rental fleet of heavy-duty drilling and rock excavation equipment.
rental.long: Instead of heavy capital investment for your projects, acquire world-class rock drills via flexible rental models.

energy.title: Power Plant Construction
energy.short: Turnkey construction and engineering services for industrial wind, solar, and renewable power plants.
energy.long: For factories, industrial sites, and investors, we handle all stages from feasibility study to turnkey commissioning.

productsPage.badge: Vera Gold Enerji - Heavy Machinery Fleet
productsPage.subtitle: Industrial B2B sales fleet for drilling rigs, rock drills, solar piling rigs, bored piling, jet grouting, and heavy diesel compressors.
productsPage.warrantyDesc: We import custom machinery matching your exact tonnage and torque specifications directly from manufacturers, delivering them operational to your job site.

map.title: Our Operational Scope
map.subtitle: Actively serving across Europe and Balkan nations except UK, Sweden, Norway, and Finland.
map.description: We deliver logistics and technical engineering power across Europe and the Balkans.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Request a corporate offer or inquire about our fleet.
